result.packet_rationale: Rows were kept when they clearly asked which button/control/option in Postal Vote BD sends or requests an OTP/verification/security code. Rows about OTP submission were flagged as sibling collisions, and the visibly malformed 'কার বাটনে' row was flagged as a synthetic/malformed artifact.
